name: Cursor Glow Trail
description: Full-page canvas overlay that renders a glowing cursor with colored particle trails. Trail density scales with movement speed, particles have gravity and fade out.
accessibility_notes: uses mix-blend-mode:screen — may look odd on light backgrounds

maxParticles.description: Maximum number of trail particles alive at once

className.description: CSS class for the canvas element

conflicts: mix-blend-mode:screen looks washed out on light backgrounds
high maxParticles can lag on integrated GPUs
usage_tip: Best for dark-mode creative sites; looks washed out on light backgrounds.
